Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement (Ccp 664.6)
Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amy Lepine for plaintiff Johanna Metzgar (via Zoom).
Salvatore Timpano, specially appearing for attorney Ronald Schivo, for defendant Brian Kendall (via Zoom).

The matter came on for hearing on a status report as to meet and confer efforts directed by the Court at the prior hearing.

Ms. Lepine reported that defendant remains out of compliance, and that plaintiff has been unable to verify the policies with insurance carriers, and that as of today, plaintiff has received no proof of continuing coverage. Ms. Lepine argued that all payments appear lapsed and requested enforcement of the settlement agreement.

Mr. Timpano responded that the insurance carriers True Stage and New York Life had been forms had been requested from them by defendant. He stated that both carriers recently responded but were slow to process the requests. He asked for additional time for processing.

Ms. Lepine maintained that defendant has had nearly a year since the agreement to arrange independent verification, yet no reliable evidence has been produced. She argued defendant has shown no intention of complying.

Following discussion, the Court agreed to continue the matter so that defendant's attorney of record, Ronald Schivo, could be present to address the issues. The court ruled as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHANNA METZGAR'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PER CCP SECTION 664.6 is continued to September 22, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D501)
